name: Gray Laundry Hamper with Lift Liner and Lid - Brightroom™: Clothes Basket, Dirty Clothes Storage, 80L Capacity
description:
Elevate your laundry experience with this Laundry Hamper with Lift Liner and Lid from Brightroom™. This laundry hamper showcases a gray fabric tapered silhouette and a white lift liner with handles for easy loading and unloading of clothes. Plus, the lidded design allows for concealing dirty laundry and offering a clean aesthetic.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
